title: noccaea capricornuta
intro: Noccaea capricornuta, also known as Alpine Pennycress, is a perennial plant species belonging to the Brassicaceae family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant activities. The plant is believed to offer various health benefits, such as reducing inflammation, improving respiratory issues, and supporting the immune system. Noccaea capricornuta can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, and is also used in folk medicine as a topical treatment for skin conditions and wounds.
